# Itay barber — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An appointment booking website in Hebrew with a two-step flow: a welcome/intro screen where the user enters their last name and phone number, followed by a 'Continue' button that leads to an appointment scheduling screen. Once an appointment is booked, the client's details are automatically sent to the business owner.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Itay barber
An appointment booking website in Hebrew with a two-step flow: a welcome/intro screen where the user enters their last name and phone number, followed by a 'Continue' button that leads to an appointment scheduling screen. Once an appointment is booked, the client's details are automatically sent to the business owner.

## Services/Products
- קביעת תורים
- איסוף פרטי לקוח (שם משפחה, מספר טלפון)

## Target Audience
- גברים צעירים מקצועיים
- הורים עסוקים
- בני נוער מודעים לאופנה

## Industry
Appointment Scheduling
